postIdeas.title: Why tokenized T-bills change the yield benchmark
postIdeas.thesis: Tokenized treasury rails create a harder benchmark for onchain capital, forcing DeFi yield to compete on real risk premium and capital efficiency.

postIdeas.title: Pendle works when yield becomes a market, not a campaign
postIdeas.thesis: Pendle matters most if onchain rates become a structural market rather than an incentive-farmed side quest.
